calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa, via Zoom, for Kyle A. Casella, Personal Representative.

The court advises counsel that it is satisfied with the information that it currently has and confirms with counsel that he has no additional information to provide.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Continued To Aug-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Schultz, specially appearing for Lawrence Siracusa, for Kyle Casella, Executor.

Counsel reports to the court regarding why Mr. Siracusa could not appear today. The court offers its position regarding the issue of the trustee's provisions. Counsel offers testimony with regard to the court's issue and points to article nine (9) of the trust's general provisions and the settlor's intent of not wanting the trust to be under court supervision and of the spouses' declination. The court advises that it can continue this matter to allow for the filing of an amended so that the testamentary trust and existing trust track each other. The court also advises counsel that it will be helpful to the court if a summary of changes is filed prior to the filing of the amended petition.

The matter is continued to Aug-16-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Duong. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 25, 2007 is admitted to probate. Kyle Casella is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 9, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-04-2021 Continued To Feb-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
